chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Present: Irshad Ali Shah, J. Agha Faisal, J. CP D372 of 2019: Shumailavs. Province of Sindh &Others For the Petitioner: Mr. Ashfaque Hussain Abro, Advocate Mr. Irfan Badar Abbasi, Advocate For Respondent No.5 &6: Mr. Abdul Jabbar Lashari, Advocate For official Respondents: Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl. A.G. Dates of hearing: 02.02.2022. Date of announcement: 02.02.2022. ORDER Agha Faisal, J. The petitioner seeks a direction to the respondents to issue an appointment order in respect of the petitioner, on account of having scored certain marks in a written test for short listing of candidates. The record demonstrates that the relevant advertisement required 2 to 3 years working experience, post qualification, which the petitioner admittedly did not possess at the relevant time. The record also demonstrates that the petitioner had failed in the interview conducted by the respondents.Learned counsel remained unable to demonstrate any entitlement of the petitioner to be considered in respect of the relief claimed. In view hereof, no case has been set forth before us to merit invocation of the discretionary writ jurisdiction of this Court; hence, this petition is hereby dismissed alongwith pending application. JUDGE JUDGE
